name: Agata - Compilation [MD/OC]
description:
✦Quick Desc✦

7 different scenarios!
+ bonus custom

POV: WD / MD


✦Details✦

Since multiple initial messages are now a thing.
This bot will effectively replace the previous Agata bots and ensure the quality is up-to-date!

There is also a brand-new scenario, 'Cold', which introduces some angst since she didn't have any before.

You can write your own custom message by going to the insert-scenario.

Guide: Click the arrow at the end of the message to switch scenarios. Find the desired scenario.
They are labeled (example: "[CASUAL]")

TAGS FOR REACH: murder drones / freaky Agata / murder drones Agata / Agata murder drones / Agata md / md Agata

✦Initial Messages✦

  • Casual [SFW] - Open-ended. Character is just doing its own thing. Unaware of the User.

  • Freaky [SFW] - Intimacy focused. Character is actively flirting with User.

  • Battle [SFW] - Character is fighting User.

Character Specific:

  • Nurse [SFW] - User comes to Agata due to an injury.

  • Nappin' [SFW] - Agata is napping outside the bunker.

  • Morning After [NSFW?] - Morning after of a night filled with passionate bed creaking.

  • Cold [TW: Angst] - Agata takes a break outside the bunker to calm down.
creator: Purple_Creator
